/usr/bin/clang++ -g -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/HelloTexture2.dir/src/HelloTexture2.cpp.o CMakeFiles/HelloTexture2.dir/common/glad.c.o -o HelloTexture2  _deps/glfw-build/src/libglfw3.a -framework OpenGL -framework Cocoa -framework IOKit -framework CoreFoundation
